race.comment: HAILSTONES (14) scored on debut over this course and distance then raced wide and wasn't disgraced at Newcastle a fortnight ago in heavy ground. Takes on the older horses but has the talent to play a big role. OAKFIELD MISSOURI (3) saluted on debut here two back then raced handy and looked a chance only to be edged out over 1200m at this track last time. Progressive three-year-old who is clearly a big threat. ROCKTHEVELIO (4) stalked the pace then destroyed a maiden field at Nowra over 1200m recently. Draws the fence and with some natural improvement can easily go back-to-back. FRANKELY SUBLIME (5) impressed first-up at Gosford, finally breaking the maiden at start 12. Can go on with the job.
